algorithm_input.title: NCARB-derived assembly room audible alarm formula
algorithm_input.design_intent: Paraphrased NCARB-derived scenario: assembly exit count and audible alarm demand. The optimizer uses fixed source-grounded code semantics while tuning visible design parameters and public scenario-model trade-offs.

scenario_facts.ncarb_scenario_theme: assembly exit count and audible alarm demand
scenario_facts.scenario_variant_differentiator: Assembly-space audible alarm variant with higher ambient-noise background.

query_preferences.meaning: prioritize audibility margin in louder assembly space

public_scenario_model.purpose: Non-normative task physics/objective-closure constraints visible to optimizers; contains no expected rule IDs or labels.

algorithm_input.visible_input_note: Visible task input only. Algorithms may also read the public scenario model and rule library. Rule labels, rule-derived feasible-region answers, and rule-id bindings remain hidden evaluation references.

source_task_origin.ncarb_scenario_theme: assembly exit count and audible alarm demand

algorithm_input.scenario_variant_note: Parameterized variant with substantive changes in facts, bounds, weights, or document context; not a fully independent real project case.
algorithm_input.scenario_variant_differentiator: Assembly-space audible alarm variant with higher ambient-noise background.
algorithm_input.nonlinear_or_auxiliary_note: Contains a helper expression such as max(), abs(), symbolic division, or a variable product.
